Free Shopify Calculator Tools

Quick, accurate calculators to help Shopify sellers price products, calculate shipping costs, and maximize profit margins.

📦 Shipping Rate Calculator

Estimate USPS, UPS, and FedEx shipping costs by weight and destination zip code.

💰 Profit Margin Calculator

Calculate net profit after Shopify fees, payment processing, COGS, and shipping.

📊 Break-Even Calculator

Find the minimum units you need to sell to cover your fixed and variable costs.

🚚 Free Shipping Threshold

Optimal free shipping threshold that boosts AOV without eating your margin.
